zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford於1257年6月24日出生在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆時，他的父親Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford37歲，母親Alice Sanford28歲。他於1279年與Margaret Mortimer在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1331年4月17日在英國奧可福爾享年73歲，埋葬在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford于1257年6月24日出生在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆时，他的父亲Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford37岁，母亲Alice Sanford28岁。他于1279年与Margaret Mortimer在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1331年4月17日在英国奧可福爾享年73岁，埋葬在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford was born on 24 June 1257, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, his father, Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford, was 37 and his mother, Alice Sanford, was 28. He married Margaret Mortimer in 1279, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 17 April 1331, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford est né le 24 juin 1257, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Sanford, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mortimer en 1279, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1331, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre.

de.Hedingham Castle, Essex, England: Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford am 24. Juni 1257 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford 37 und seine Mutter Alice Sanford 28. Er hat 1279 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. April 1331 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Mortimer nel 1279, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 aprile 1331, nel Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Earls Colne, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxfordが1257年6月24日にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxfordは37歳，母Alice Sanfordは28歳であった。1279年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1331年4月17日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで73歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford(이)가 1257년 6월 24일 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Sanford(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1279년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1331년 4월 17일 영국 스퍼드실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford nasceu em 24 de junho de 1257, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Sanford, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mortimer em 1279, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford родился 24 июня 1257 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Sanford, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mortimer в 1279 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 апреля 1331 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия.
